title: Casual 3ish Mile Saturday Morning Run
description: Join us for a casual 3ish-mile run in the neighborhood. All paces are welcome as long as you can complete the distance. We meet at the bottom of the Windmuller Park stairs, at 54th Street and Woodside Avenue. We will wait 5-10 minutes to allow for late arrivals. Please be prompt! We often get coffee […]

title: Zumba with Veva
description: Start your Saturday off with an enjoyable and effective workout! (At office during inclement weather.)

description: Kids Art Club! Clases de Arte para Niñxs! – Lessons change Weekly Students learn about art theory, movements and how to find and use their creative voice. Led by artist instructors. Geared towards the process of learning & finding your creative voice. All young artists learn in different ways, and we allow room for them […]

title: Boxing/Kickboxing Workout
description: America’s Finest Karate & Kickboxing will join us on 34 Ave & 93 St to offer free kickboxing class (12+ years old).

title: JHBG’s Tree LC
description: We need your help to keep our trees and gardens healthy and clean! Meet 10am in front of 3541 80th st! We will gather our tools and head out to the treebeds and gardens to water, clean and mulch. We work until noon. No experience necessary – we supply work gloves, tools and guidance. We […]

title: 34 Ave World Bike Ride
description: Travel the world without leaving Queens: Beginner to intermediate rides to points of interest in & around Jackson Heights. Rides are open to all. No bike? Are you 16 yo or over? No worries @Citibike has you covered. Download app before arrival. No helmet – just DM us before the ride and we will bring one […]

title: 34 Ave Gardening Club
description: Meet up at 10:00am 34 Ave & 93 St to pick up gloves and tools and for street assignment.

title: Clases de Baile – Cumbia Sonidera
description: Cumbia Sonidera Lessons- all ages. Come ready to dance with our instructor extraordinaire @coolmarx (inside school or outside – instructor will decide)

title: Processing Through Poetry: A Writing Workshop with Leisly Ann Roman
description: Join award-winning author & mental health advocate Leisly Ann Roman for a 2-Part interactive writing workshop in honor of Mental Health Awareness Month. We’ll use imagery & personification to give voice to our everyday emotions – particularly the most difficult & unpleasant ones – and practice utilizing poetry and/or journaling to cultivate healthy responses to […]

title: Jackson Pilates Open House
description: Jackson Pilates is opening their doors for a free community open house. Drop by to tour the studio, meet the team, and learn more about classes. More info: jacksonpilates.com

title: Art Class (Adults)
description: The Jackson Heights Art Club offers several weekly adult classes in watercolor, oil, acrylic, pastel and drawing. Each student receives individual guidance and assistance from our professional instructors at the Club’s Studio. One may register or learn more about the classes by visiting their website or calling (718) 426-9821

title: CQA Poetry Slam
description: Central Queens Academy is hosting its first-ever Poetry Slam!  Come support our students as they share their original writing and celebrate the power of words. Students will be performing their own poetry and fables. Help us cheer them on and inspire a love for the art of storytelling!

title: Children’s Art Class ( 7 years and up)
description: Instruction is given individually and suitable for both beginning and experienced artists. It can include simple drawing, watercolors, oil, acrylics, etc. A set of four weekly classes is $100 for members; or $125 for nonmembers. One class is $30 for members or $40 for nonmembers. Membership in the club is $75. One may register or […]

title: Queens Night Market
address: Flushing Meadows Corona Park, Building, Corona, NY 11368, USA
description: NYC’S FIRST & MOST AFFORDABLE NIGHT MARKET! The Queens Night Market is a large, family-friendly open-air night market in Queens, featuring over 100 independent vendors selling merchandise, art, and food and featuring small-scale cultural performances, all celebrating the rich cultural diversity and heritage of NYC and Queens. Vendor list: https://queensnightmarket.com/vendors Performers 04:00 pm – 05:45 pm: […]

title: Complimentary Wine Tasting
description: Stop by between 5pm and 8pm. Let us introduce you to wines worth talking about.

title: Duduka Da Fonseca Quadrilogy | Samba Jazz
description: Join GRAMMY®-nominated drummer Duduka Da Fonseca for an evening of vibrant Brazilian jazz. title: Music Show: Virginia Marcs
description: Come on by, enjoy a coffee, and listen to some tunes surrounded by great food, friendly service, and local art.
